title: TriaxialResultProperties
description: TriaxialResultProperties: Properties related to the results based on the triaxial tests.

InitialWaterMoistureContent.description: Specimen initial water/moisture content (TRIT_IMC). Property has a quantity of type Ratio meassured in [-].

FinalWaterMoistureContent.description: Specimen final water/moisture content (TRIT_FMC). Property has a quantity of type Ratio meassured in [-].

TotalCellPressure.description: Total cell pressure (TRIT_CELL). Property has a quantity of type Pressure meassured in [Pa].

DeviatorStress.description: Corrected deviator stress at failure (TRIT_DEVF). Property has a quantity of type Stress meassured in [Pa].

BulkDensity.description: Initial bulk density (TRIT_BDEN). Property has a quantity of type Density meassured in [kg/m³].

DryDensity.description: Initial dry density (TRIT_DDEN). Property has a quantity of type Density meassured in [kg/m³].

AxialStrain.description: Axial strain at failure (TRIT_STRN). Property has a quantity of type Strain meassured in [-].

FailureZoneWaterContent.description: Failure zone water content (TRIT_FZWC). Property has a quantity of type Ratio meassured in [-].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
